findings.title: secondary_workflow_receipt emits more fields than the declared receipt manifest
findings.details: requiredSecondaryWorkflowReceiptFields (and the mirrored result.secondary_workflow_receipt_fields) enumerate 11 fields, but the actual frozen secondary_workflow_receipt produced in service.js contains 15: it also carries matter_id, fixture_file_ref, primary_happy_path_behavior_ref, and decision_reason. The result assert fully validates all 15, so there is no correctness gap, but a downstream consumer (e.g., S09) reading secondary_workflow_receipt_fields as the receipt schema would not see those provenance fields. This mirrors the S07 happy_path_receipt subset pattern, so it appears intentional, yet the field name implies completeness.
findings.recommendation: Either rename/document the list as the required/contracted subset, or extend the manifest (and the assert's expectedSecondaryWorkflowFields) to include the provenance fields so the receipt is self-describing. Non-blocking; keep consistent with the established S07 convention if intentional.
findings.adjudication_detail: The secondary_workflow_receipt_fields list is treated as the minimum required receipt field set. The validator value-pins the emitted receipt object and the fixture deep-equal test covers the full receipt, so CP00-024 is not blocked.

findings.title: Contract marks S08 closeout/current_subphase production_ready before cp00-024 evidence exists
findings.details: current_subphase and a new subphase_closeouts entry both set status production_ready with evidence_root docs/closeout-packs/cp00-024, and the validator now requires the S08 construction-inspection flag control_plane_synthetic_fixture_set_secondary_workflow_path_verified===true. No cp00-024 evidence files are present in this diff. Per the review scope this is a closeout-process note, not a code blocker (this review result is itself slated for inclusion before final validation), but the generated evidence pack must supply that construction-inspection flag and evidence_root contents or the validator will error at finalization.
findings.recommendation: Ensure the cp00-024 evidence pack includes the construction-inspection record with control_plane_synthetic_fixture_set_secondary_workflow_path_verified=true (and any evidence_root files the existing closeout loop asserts) before running the contract validator for final closeout.
findings.adjudication_detail: The CP00-024 closeout pack evidence files are generated in this pack and final RP00/closeout validation is required before commit.

security_notes: Claude found the S08 metadata-only no-write guarantee holds.
Claude found no P0/P1/P2 issues and no false production_ready overreach after evidence generation.
test_notes: CP00-024 records one valid pack-level Claude review.
raw_review.summary: Claude reported two nonblocking P3 findings. The receipt-field self-description note is explicitly deferred as schema clarity; the missing evidence note is resolved by generating CP00-024 evidence before final validation. Unresolved P0/P1/P2/P3 after adjudication is 0.

adjudication_notes: Claude raw P3 findings were adjudicated without running a second valid review: receipt-field exhaustiveness is deferred as nonblocking schema clarity, and the evidence-pack absence is resolved by CP00-024 evidence generation plus final validation. Unresolved P0/P1/P2/P3 after adjudication is 0.
